L3 pre lamp: 3x Ritual Blood(1) in the small chest in the treasure room and 6x Fire Paper in the special coffin. 3x Ritual Blood(2) on three separate corpses in the room that is connected to the bridge that also leads to the treasure room. Pthumeru 2.desc: Beast-Possessed Soul | Merciless Watchers | Keeper of the Old Lords | Pthumerian Descendant  --  L1 main: pilgrim (talisman). L2 and L3 narrow crossroads with same treasure room. L4 main: bonus area on opposite side of drawbridge blocked by wooden chest, messenger bath on 2nd floor of a garden.

Merciless Watchers | Beast-Possessed Soul | Watchdog of the Old Lords | Keeper of the Old Lords  --  L1 pre lamp: rolling fatty guarding coffin with Uncanny Saw Spear. Main: evil labyrinth spirit (uncommon spawn place?). L3 main: illusory wall near lamp leading to treasure room, garden with 2 ritekeepers. Pre boss: chest that alerts enemies when opened, 3 ritekeepers, illusory wall. Uncanny Threaded Cane in coffin. L4 pre lamp: watcher in garden drops cursed gems. L4 main: evil labyrinth spirit in ladder room. Illusory wall up the double staircase. Pre boss: ritekeeper in Standard room, 3 pressure plate summoning traps.

Merciless Watchers | Beast-Possessed Soul | Keeper of the Old Lords | Pthumerian Descendant  --  L1 main: Olek in canyon. L1 pre-boss: illusory wall in ladder room. L4 pre-boss: sleeping cannon giant.

Keeper of the Old Lords | Merciless Watchers | Beast-Possessed Soul | Watchdog of the Old Lords  --  L1 main: Olek in a room with 2 trees, illusory wall in the same room. L3 main: illusory wall near lamp leading to treasure room. Patrolling cleaver watcher in garden. Bonus area within main room: rolling fatty guarding coffin. Ceiling flower on 2nd floor in garden. L4 main: sleeping sickle giant, pile of dead pigs in Standard room. Bonus area within main room: illusory wall in room with 2 trees. Pre boss: underground sewage room with slimes, 4 kidnappers, undead corpses and scorpion, tempering droplet in coffin.

Beast-Possessed Soul | Merciless Watchers | Watchdog of the Old Lords | Keeper of the Old Lords  --  L1 pre-lamp: watcher guarding coffin drops cursed gems. L2 main: illusory wal behind triple arrow trap. L3 pre-lamp: rare chest with 2 labyrinth spirits. L3 main: bronze door on folding staircase, illusory wall on 2nd floor of garden, weirdly placed hanging lantern

Main: rare chest that summons 3 spirits, ritekeeper nearby. L3 main: chest that alerts other enemies. Pre boss: rolling fatty guarding coffin with uncanny saw spear. L4 main: empty mole tunnel blocked by coffin trap.

Merciless Watchers | Maneater Boar | Pthumerian Descendant | Beast-Possessed Soul  --  L1 main: Olek in canyon, illusory wall in doorway in crossroads. L2 pre-boss: 2x twin dagger pthumerian, Olek and staff Pilgrim in dark room with 2 trees. L4 main: sewer ceiling overlapping with circular room above

Maneater Boar | Beast-Possessed Soul | Undead Giant (chains) | Watchdog of the Old Lords  --  L1 main: staff Pilgrim. L1 pre-boss: twin dagger pthumerian, Olek at boss gate, scorpion with weird patrol route. L3 main: talisman Pilgrim, lever skip. L4 pre-lamp: adept gem in coffin

L4 main: pile of pigs on top of bonfire.

Beast-Possessed Soul | Merciless Watchers | Keeper of the Old Lords | Watchdog of the Old Lords  --  L1 main/pre-boss meriless watchers for lever/coffin guard, both dropped cursed tempering blood gems, L1-preboss coffin treasure ritual blood 2. L2 Pre-boss Uncanny Saw Spear, treasure room contains Healing Roller Fatty , Mericless Watcher also right outside treasure room L3 Pilgrim (staff) in Main area above garden, L3 Main area treasure room 12 tomb mold. L4 pre lamp double stone chest 3ritual blood 3 ,3 sage;s wrist, 2phumarians guarding wooden containing 2 sages wrist chest, wooden chest containing Adept Gem (3) blunt atk up 10.1% L4 lever guard Roller Fatty with 5 pole arm pthumarians 2 m

L3 main, bonus area: illusory wall in a room with cannon, watcher at coffin drops cursed bloodtinge gems. L4: Olek before boss gate.

Hintertomb 3 Sinister.desc:
Keeper of the Old Lords | Beast-Possessed Soul | Blood-Starved Beast  --  L1 main - cannon in dark room, Olek, hidden wall to balcony, L1 preboss - coffin=uncanny stake driver
L2 main - brick rain in lamp room?, floor drop sound glitch, L2 pre-boss - coffin= T2 great deep sea, sleeping cannon giant
L3 main - dark room with 3 spike dogs + eye collector - L3 pre-lamp - canyon w/ 2 poison pigs

Beast-Possessed Soul | Keeper of the Old Lords | Blood-Starved Beast  --  L1 main: eye collector in circular room. L2 pre lamp: circular platform with a cannon, Uncanny Stake Driver. L3 pre lamp: labyrinth madman in the middle of a treasure room, messener bath in small sideroom next to boulder trap, Deep Sea tier 2

Beast-Possessed Soul | Keeper of the Old Lords | Pthumerian Elder  --  L1 pre-boss - poison spike dog, Olek, coffin = tri beasthunter gem (r14, 9.7% vs beast, 9,7% vs kin secondary), L2 main - rare (empty) treasure room with a one-way door, L3 pre-boss - bonus door leading to a regular chest room with several oil urns in the middle and 1 molotov pthumerian, a lot of oil urns along the corridor walls, L3 pre-lamp - coffin = T2 deep sea

Blood-starved Beast (cave) | Keeper of the Old Lords | Watchdog of the Old Lords  --  L1 main: underground area with lots of crawling corpses and hookers, illusory wall near boss gate. Pre boss: illusory wall in 4 pillar 2 floor room. L3 pre lamp: door that can be opened twice, Great Lake tier 2. L3 main: hole in the ceiling in a tunnel, dark circular room with an eye collector and 3 sharp dogs. Bonus area in circular room: keeper with helldogs. L3 pre boss: Stunning Deep Sea tier 2

Beast-Possessed Soul | Keeper of the Old Lords | Blood-Starved Beast  --  L1 pre-lamp - coffin = great one CB, L1 pre-boss - madman in the corner right after the bonus door, L2 pre-lamp connected with main via fountain area (has cannon), L2 main has 3 spider ambush from above around an item

Maneater Boar | Beast-Possessed Soul | Blood-Starved Beast  --  L1 main - small snake ball ambush under the bridge, L2 main has sleeping cannon giant, L3 main has Carla with 2 tongue dogs, L3 bonus inside main - cannon room

Maneater Boar | Beast-possesed Soul | Blood-starved Beast  --  L1 pre-boss: Great One Coldblood in the special coffin. L2 main: dark hallway before lever room has a cannon, but no Pthumerian to use it. Lever room has weirdly placed arrow traps on the highest floor and a corpse Madman and a lot of spiders on the lowest, plus more spiders hanging from the ceiling. L2 pre-boss: uncanny Stake Driver in the special coffin. L3
Keeper of the Old Lords | Undead Giant (Chains) | Watchdog of the Old Lords  --  L1 pre-boss - Odd Damp Bloodgem (4) in a chest, L3 - Sinister Bell and an Odd Damp Bloodgem (3) in a chest

Undead Giant (Cannon) | Keeper of the Old Lords | Blood-starved Beast  --  L1 main - Odd Damp Bloodgem (4) in Chest, L2 - pre-main bonus room: dark circular room with 1 Hemwick witch and 3 Hemwick dogs with 6 fire pits (BBQ), L3 - sleeping Undead Giant (Cannon), bonus room in main room, inside that bonus room there is a sinister bell
Beast-Possessed Soul | Maneater Boar | Pthumerian Elder  --  L2 main: tier 2 Stunning Deep Sea rune in the special coffin. L3 pre-lamp: tier 2 Great Lake rune in the special coffin.

Keeper of the Old Lords | Beast-possesed Soul | Blood-starved Beast  --  L1 pre-boss: Kirkhammer Prospector in a dark cave. L2 main: glitched arch inside an underground tunnel that leads to the secret bonus area. Rare illusory wall atop ladder room in the secret bonus area. Beasthunter's Damp Blood Gem (4) in the secret coffin. Cannon atop circular room on the way to the lever room. L3 main: bonfires at the bottom of the ladder room right outside the lamp room. Kirkhammer Prospector guarding the access to the boss arena.

Beast-Possessed Soul | Keeper of the Old Lords | Pthumerian Elder  --  L1 premain: uncommon chest on the rafters; odd damp blt gem in a coffin, L1 preboss: Great Lake, L2 preboss: Uncanny Stake Driver; unusual small room with the bell maiden on the 1st floor of ladder room; bonus treasure door opens into waning-shaped corridor, leading back to the room with a chest from main area, L3: it's huge and has lever skip as well as bonus treasure door; Great One Coldblood in a coffin; heavily rooted long narrow corridor; double chest
Beast-Possessed Soul | Keeper of the Old Lords | Blood-starved Beast

Maneater Boar | Blood-starved Beast (one pillar) | Pthumerian Elder  --  L1 premain: Stunning Deep Sea, L1 main: barbeque room right outside the lamp, L1 preboss: Uncanny Stake Driver; unexpected ladder traffic, L2 premain: Deep Sea, L2 main: sinister bell, L3 premain: Great Lake; tomp prospector hunter, L3 main: bridge above standart layout; bonus treasure door, leading back to premain area

Keeper of the Old Lords | Maneater Boar | Pthumerian Elder  --  L1 preboss: Uncanny Stake Driver, L1 main: small snake ball, L2 main: 3 spiked dogs in a circular arena full of oil barrels, L2 preboss: Great One Coldblood in a coffin, L3 main: lever skip; bonus treasure door; Beasthunter's Damp Blood Gem in a coffin

Keeper of the Old Lords | Beast-Possessed Soul | Watchdog of the Old Lords  --  L2 premain: Great Deep Sea, L2 main: illusory wall, L3: lever skip, L3 preboss: flower, hiding underground; 2 keepers with dogs nearby to each other; Beasthunter's Damp Blood Gem +8.9% vs beasts and kin in a coffin

Fire Damp Blood Gem (Fire ATK UP+16.5%) in pre boss coffin. L3: Odd Tempering Damp Blood Gem (Add physical ATK+23.1) in pre lamp coffin. Illusory wall near lamp room, loot in the treasure room behind it isn't it chests, but on corpses. Cramped room with bell before drawbridge lever has spiders hanging from the ceiling. Unusual location of secret bonus room on opposite side of drawbridge. Room before secret treasure room has spiders hanging from the ceiling. Lost Saw Spear in secret coffin. Uncanny Kirkhammer in pre boss coffin.

Breaking yields a hard to pick up item: R Blood (3) x5.10x~ Fire paper throughout layer. Pre-boss: Keeper in unusal place. Another keeper

Main Area: Wandering Pilgrim first room. Pre-boss Nonus Room: Bell room with double maidens. 3 arrows with elongates activation plate. L2: Ladder layout, Boss gate placement unusual. Labryinth spirit. Chest hiden in corner across the bridge.Pre-boss Bonus Room: Chest on a balcony contining Tomb Mould(3) x3(connected to ladder room) L3: Pre-boss Bonus Room: chest Inflicted organ x3 Main chested guraded by Tomb Guardian (Ball on Chain)

L2 Prelamp has a narrow long "L"-Shaped corridor , Coffin contains Formless Odeon 1 with brainsucker guarding. Wandering Pilgrim L3. pre lamp, double bell maidens. Door in middle of big room (same as l1- never seen this before, might be normal) gun watcher and kidnapper guarding coffin - Lost Saw Cleaver.

Maneater Boar | Merciless Watchers | Keeper of the Old Lords  --  L1: Firstly; layout is 'well', which in itself doesn't seem to common in Pthumeru. Secondly, pre-lamp seems to have a lot of pathing. That's firstly through the door and down in the tunnels.Pre-boss guarded by Tomb Guradian(ball on chain). L2: Pre-lamp has a Frenzy Woman spawning chest containg Tomb Mould(3) x4. L2: rare illusory wall in the ladder room in pre lamp. L3: glitched Fluorescent Flower in the pre lamp garden. Bell room near ladder room in secret bonus area has spiders hanging froma ceiling. Triple arrow trap on ladder room. Secret treasure room is guarded by cleaver Watchers and Pthumerians.

Pthumerian Warrior on the balcony before the secret treasure room.
